title: gnaphalium indutum
intro: Gnaphalium indutum, also known as the woolly cudweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gnaphalium indutum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. Gnaphalium indutum can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
